title: Prometheus provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Prometheus integration. Enterprise-only via monitoring_prometheus entitlement. Two modes: (1) OUTBOUND — push metrics to a tenant-hosted Pushgateway; (2) INBOUND — expose an AlertManager webhook endpoint that accepts POST from tenant's own Prometheus + re-emits as internal monitoring alerts. Both modes share this config.

mode.description: pushgateway: outbound — Academorix pushes metrics to tenant Pushgateway. alertmanager_receiver: inbound — Academorix hosts a webhook receiver that AlertManager POSTs to. both: enable both modes.

pushgateway_url.description: Required when mode IN (pushgateway, both). Full URL to the tenant's Pushgateway. HTTPS strongly recommended; HTTP allowed for local dev only.

pushgateway_job_name.description: Job name applied to pushed metrics. Grouped in Prometheus by this name.

pushgateway_instance.description: Optional instance label. Defaults to '<tenant_short_id>' for tenant scoping in Prometheus queries.

pushgateway_auth_bearer.description: Optional Bearer token for authenticated Pushgateway. Encrypted at rest. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.

alertmanager_receiver_secret.description: Required when mode IN (alertmanager_receiver, both). Shared secret for HMAC verification of AlertManager webhook posts. Encrypted at rest. AlertManager MUST send X-Alertmanager-Signature: sha256(secret + payload).

receiver_severity_map.description: Optional mapping from AlertManager 'severity' label to monitoring severity. Default: critical→p1, warning→p2, info→p3, none→p4.
